description_long: This sculpture features three life-sized, nude male figures arranged on a rectangular plinth. The central figure is seated, hunched forward with a staff, while the two flanking figures stand upright, one with an arm raised to his forehead as if shielding his eyes, and the other with arms crossed or held close to the body. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed musculature and expressive postures. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, greenish patina typical of aged bronze. The base is solid and rectangular, with some visible text or inscription along the front edge.
description: A realistic bronze sculpture of three nude male figures, one seated and two standing, on a rectangular plinth with a greenish patina.
description_view_0: Side view showing the forward stride of the leftmost standing figure and the seated central figure holding a staff.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three figures, with the central figure seated and the leftmost figure saluting or shading his eyes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the rightmost standing figure and the back of the seated figure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of all three figures, with the draped cloak of the central figure most visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three nude male human figures in a realistic style
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for outdoor installation, likely in a public urban space or park, as suggested by the robust plinth and weathered surface.
